title: 美劇《魔戒》第一季製作費加碼至4.65億美元 號稱史上最大型劇集

replies.msg:
Amazon於2017年以2.6億（約20.3億港元）美元買下《魔戒》（The Lord of the Rings）系列的電視版權，並於去年2月在奧克蘭開拍。昨日有報道指，《魔戒》的製作費將由原先預計的5億美元（約39億港元）拍幾季，加碼至4.65億美元（約36.27億港元）拍一季，號稱史上最大型的電視劇集。


新西蘭經濟發展及旅遊局長Stuart Nash向傳媒表示：「我可以告訴你的是，單是第一季就會花大約6.5億紐元，將會很精采。」數字是由新西蘭政府正式公佈，官方文件亦證實Amazon計劃在當地拍攝五季《魔戒》，更可能添拍尚未公佈的外傳系列。對比起《魔戒》，HBO的《權力遊戲》（Game of Thrones）平均每季製作費大約1億美元（約7.8億港元），由第一季每集花費600美元（約4,680萬港元），到第八季已跳升至1,500萬美元（約1.17億港元）。

新西蘭政府昨日亦表示已同意增加Amazon 5%的製作費補貼，期望未來數年獲得更高的經濟及旅遊收益，該筆資助大約有1.16億美元（約9億港元）。《魔戒》第一季於去年在奧克蘭開拍時已雇用超過1,200名員工，大約700名外判的工作人員。

美劇《魔戒》第一季製作費加碼至36億 號稱史上最大型劇集

replies.msg: The official description: The Lord of the Rings "brings to screens for the very first time the heroic legends of the fabled Second Age of Middle-earth's history. This epic drama is set thousands of years before the events of J.R.R. Tolkien's The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings, and will take viewers back to an era in which great powers were forged, kingdoms rose to glory and fell to ruin, unlikely heroes were tested, hope hung by the finest of threads, and the greatest villain that ever flowed from Tolkien's pen threatened to cover all the world in darkness. Beginning in a time of relative peace, the series follows an ensemble cast of characters, both familiar and new, as they confront the long-feared re-emergence of evil to Middle-earth. From the darkest depths of the Misty Mountains, to the majestic forests of the elf-capital of Lindon, to the breathtaking island kingdom of Númenor, to the furthest reaches of the map, these kingdoms and characters will carve out legacies that live on long after they are gone."

quote.msg: The official description: The Lord of the Rings "brings to screens for the very first time the heroic legends of the fabled Second Age of Middle-earth's history. This epic drama is set thousands of years before the events of J.R.R. Tolkien's The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings, and will take viewers back to an era in which great powers were forged, kingdoms rose to glory and fell to ruin, unlikely heroes were tested, hope hung by the finest of threads, and the greatest villain that ever flowed from Tolkien's pen threatened to cover all the world in darkness. Beginning in a time of relative peace, the series follows an ensemble cast of characters, both familiar and new, as they confront the long-feared re-emergence of evil to Middle-earth. From the darkest depths of the Misty Mountains, to the majestic forests of the elf-capital of Lindon, to the breathtaking island kingdom of Númenor, to the furthest reaches of the map, these kingdoms and characters will carve out legacies that live on long after they are gone."
